user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of exit approver groups with their exit type, locations, departments and approvers, so that I can review how exit approvals are configured.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Approvers screen; When the page loads; Then I see a paginated list showing exit approvers group name, exit type, location(s), department(s) and exit approvers

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new exit approvers group, so that exits of a given type in specific locations and departments route to the right approvers.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Approvers screen; When I click Add new approvers and provide the group name, exit type, locations, departments and approvers; Then the new approver group is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing exit approvers group, so that I can keep approver assignments accurate as teams change.
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit approvers group exists in the list; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the exit approvers list, so that I always see the latest configured groups.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Approvers screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the exit approver groups and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the exit setup workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given there are more approver groups than fit on one page; When I use the pagination controls or click Next; Then I can navigate the records or advance to the next step
